subject: Gaming
title: The WHO and Gaming Disorder
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: The WHO and Gaming Disorder.

hook.text: The WHO classified gaming disorder as a medical condition in 2018. The gaming industry fought back hard.

buildup.text: The classification listed impaired control over gaming as a diagnosable mental health condition.

discovery.text: Over 30 scholars signed an open letter opposing the decision. They said the evidence was insufficient.

twist.text: Two years later, the WHO promoted gaming during COVID lockdowns. The contradiction was noted by many.

climax.text: The debate remains unresolved: is problematic gaming its own disorder or a symptom of deeper issues?

punchline.text: A disorder in 2018. A lifeline in 2020. The WHO contradicted itself.

quiz.question: Why was the WHO's gaming disorder classification controversial?
options: Over 30 scholars said the evidence was insufficient, and the WHO later promoted gaming during COVID
The gaming industry supported the decision
